Good morning everyone. Let's begin the weekly meeting. Maria, can you give us an update on the translation project?
Sure. We've completed the integration of the transcription service with the translation module. The system can now transcribe and translate in real time.
And how is the accuracy of the Chinese to Spanish translation working?
The results are quite good. The error rate is less than ten percent for short sentences. For longer texts, context significantly improves the quality.
Excellent. What are the next steps?
We need to run tests with real meetings with multiple participants. We also want to add automatic language detection.
